extension.summary: Echo OnDemand — IPTV VOD + Wrestling + Fights + Live Sports
extension.description: Browse and play Movies and Series from your Xtream Codes IPTV service, plus three on-demand replay sources via debrid: Wrestling Rewind, Wrestling on Demand (WWE / AEW / TNA / NJPW / ROH / NWA / Indy / Documentaries / Archive), and Fights on Demand (UFC PPV and Fight Night, MMA, Boxing — including a Free / No Debrid sub-menu). Includes a Live category with WOD's wrestling channels and curated Pluto TV sports streams (Golf, F1, UFC, Bellator, ONE, Top Rank Classics, DAZN Ringside). Pluto channels are resolved with fresh session tokens at play time. Settings backup/restore protects credentials across reinstalls. Movies listed by genre. Series support full season and episode navigation. Results cached locally. Kodi Omega (v21) compatible. Requires script.module.resolveurl with an active debrid account.
